assembly_instructions: Classic Prusa i3 'bed-slinger' layout. Two parallel M8 smooth rods mounted on a 2020 aluminium Y-base carry a Y-carriage with a removable magnetic heat bed on top. A single-sheet aluminium vertical frame stands at the rear and cantilevers the X-axis gantry; two Z-motors drive the gantry up and down. The X-carriage rides on the X-extrusion and carries the direct-drive extruder with its own NEMA17 motor; a 0.4 mm brass nozzle hangs below it. A top-mounted filament holder feeds the spool, and an LCD display on the Einsy case reports status.

info.english_name: Original Prusa i3 MK3S+ FDM 3D Printer
info.summary: Flagship open-source bed-slinger FDM printer from Prusa Research. 250×210×210 mm build volume, direct-drive Bondtech extruder, magnetic removable spring-steel sheet, filament and power-loss sensors.
info.description: The Original Prusa i3 MK3S+ is the production workhorse of the Prusa i3 family — itself a long-running open-source derivative of Josef Prusa's original RepRap i3. The printer follows the classic 'bed-slinger' kinematics: the heat bed moves on the Y axis along two parallel M8 smooth rods on a 2020 aluminium base, while a cantilevered single-sheet aluminium frame at the rear carries the XZ gantry. Two Z-motors with lead screws raise and lower the X-extrusion; the X-carriage rides on the extrusion and carries the MK3S+ direct-drive extruder with a Bondtech dual-gear feeder, an E3D V6-compatible hotend, and a 0.4 mm brass nozzle. The removable magnetic spring-steel PEI sheet on top of the heated bed lets prints pop off by flexing. Firmware, electronics (Einsy RAMBo with TMC2130 drivers), and full CAD are released on GitHub — the printer is one of the most-cloned FDM designs in existence.
info.operator: Prusa Research customers + the wider open FDM community
info.contractor: Prusa Research (Josef Prusa et al., Prague)
info.contract_date: MK3S released Feb 2019 · MK3S+ upgrade released Oct 2020
info.status: In production through MK4 successor; MK3S+ still sold/upgradable

facts.label: Heat bed
facts.value: Magnetic base + removable PEI-coated spring-steel sheet

facts.label: Electronics
facts.value: Einsy RAMBo with TMC2130 stealthChop drivers

facts.label: Sensors
facts.value: SuperPINDA probe, filament sensor, power-loss recovery

sources.title: Prusa Research — i3 MK3S+ knowledge base
Prusa Research — Original Prusa i3 MK3S+ product page

parts.name: Y-Axis Base (2020 extrusion)
parts.role: Aluminium-extrusion base that supports the Y-axis rods, the frame, and the Y motor.

parts.name: Y-Axis M8 Smooth Rod
parts.role: Hardened M8 smooth rod (one of two) guiding the Y-carriage along the bed-slinger axis.

parts.name: Y-Carriage
parts.role: Aluminium plate that rides on the two M8 rods and carries the heat bed.

parts.name: Heat Bed + Spring-Steel Sheet
parts.role: MK52 magnetic heat bed with a removable PEI-coated spring-steel print sheet on top.

parts.name: Single-Sheet Aluminium Frame
parts.role: Laser-cut single-sheet aluminium frame that cantilevers the X/Z axes off the Y base.

parts.name: X-Axis Extrusion (XZ Gantry)
parts.role: Horizontal aluminium extrusion that rides up and down on the Z lead-screws and carries the X-carriage.

parts.name: X-Carriage
parts.role: Carriage that slides along the X extrusion — the extruder assembly bolts to its front face.

parts.name: MK3S+ Direct-Drive Extruder
parts.role: Bondtech dual-gear direct-drive extruder + E3D V6 hotend.

parts.name: Hotend Nozzle (0.4 mm brass)
parts.role: 0.4 mm brass nozzle for 1.75 mm filament; swappable for other diameters and hardened variants.

parts.name: NEMA17 (X-axis)
parts.role: NEMA17 stepper on the right end of the X extrusion — drives the X-carriage via a belt.

parts.name: NEMA17 (Y-axis)
parts.role: NEMA17 stepper at the rear of the Y base — drives the Y-carriage belt.

parts.name: NEMA17 (Z-axis, representative)
parts.role: NEMA17 stepper at the top-left of the frame — one of two Z motors driving the lead screws. Right-side Z motor is identical.

parts.name: NEMA17 (Extruder)
parts.role: NEMA17 stepper on the extruder body — direct-drives the Bondtech feeder gears.

parts.name: Spool Holder
parts.role: Spool holder bolted to the top of the frame; carries a 1 kg filament spool feeding down into the extruder.

parts.name: LCD Control Panel
parts.role: Monochrome LCD + rotary encoder on the Einsy case; prints, leveling, and diagnostics menu.
